channel.title: Wood on Design Moodboard Archive
channel.description: Recent content in Wood on Design Moodboard Archive

item.title: Alankaram
item.description: Saved under Stores / Furniture / Indian from the furniture-store list. Use this entry for Indian furniture, seating, tables, storage, beds, wood, craft, and home-furnishing references. Primary location/base: New Delhi, Bangalore, Mumbai.

item.title: Indian Wood Furniture Source
item.description: Add favorite chairs, tables, finishes, and price notes here.

item.title: Phantom Hands
item.description: Saved under Stores / Furniture / Indian from the furniture-store list. Use this entry for Indian furniture, seating, tables, storage, beds, wood, craft, and home-furnishing references. Primary location/base: Bangalore, Karnataka.

item.title: Stores / Furniture / Indian
item.description: Use this collection for Indian furniture sources and makers, especially wood pieces, carved details, cane, storage, and dining furniture.

item.title: Stores / Furniture / International
item.description: Use this collection for international furniture stores and references that are useful for form, layout, or material inspiration.

item.title: Suncity Art
item.description: Saved under Stores / Furniture / Indian from the furniture-store list. Use this entry for Indian furniture, seating, tables, storage, beds, wood, craft, and home-furnishing references. Primary location/base: Jodhpur, Rajasthan.

item.title: Wooden Street
item.description: Saved under Stores / Furniture / Indian from the furniture-store list. Use this entry for Indian furniture, seating, tables, storage, beds, wood, craft, and home-furnishing references. Primary location/base: Jodhpur / Jaipur, Rajasthan.
